patch.value: Feature delivers option policy resolution enforcement and help/error surfacing for core create/update workflows.
Implement type-aware required, visible, and enabled option policies for create/update command UX with compatibility-safe defaults.
Create/update enforce configured option enabled/required policies; help/error output reflects active policies; no regressions for default users.
Epic scope and compatibility constraints are approved.
Make option contracts configurable and discoverable
Improves operator and agent success rates
Current static option surface cannot express per-domain policy controls
Reduces failed command retries caused by unclear option contracts.

value.author: codex-agent

value.text: Default behavior must remain unchanged unless explicit policy config exists.
